github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Write conventional commit messages in English (type(scope): summary). Keep the subject line ≤ 72 chars. Do not include 'Co-authored-by' or AI attribution lines.

github.copilot.chat.testGeneration.instr.text: Tests go in tests/. Use pytest. Only write CPU-runnable unit tests (no GPU/ONNX/model required). GPU-accelerated stages are verified via scripts/run_pipeline.py + scripts/golden_snapshot.py, not unit tests.
